# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

// Define public paths that don't require authentication
const PUBLIC_PATHS = new Set([
  '/login',
  '/register',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/reset-password',
  '/api/auth/login',
  '/api/auth/register',
  '/api/auth/refresh',
  '/_next',
  '/favicon.ico',
  '/public',
]);

// Define paths that should be accessible only to unauthenticated users
const AUTH_ONLY_PATHS = new Set([
  '/login',
  '/register',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/reset-password',
]);

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = '__session_token';
const REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME = '__refresh_token';
const TOKEN_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM = 'HMAC';
const HASH_ALGORITHM = 'SHA-256';

interface TokenPayload {
  sub: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  exp: number;
  iat: number;
  jti: string;
  iss: string;
  aud: string;
}

/**
 * Import a secret key for HMAC verification using the Web Crypto API
 * available in Edge Runtime.
 */
async function importKey(secret: string): Promise<CryptoKey> {
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const keyData = encoder.encode(secret);

  return crypto.subtle.importKey(
    'raw',
    keyData,
    { name: TOKEN_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM, hash: HASH_ALGORITHM },
    false,
    ['sign', 'verify']
  );
}

/**
 * Base64URL decode (Edge-compatible, no Node.js Buffer)
 */
function base64UrlDecode(input: string): Uint8Array {
  let base64 = input.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/');
  while (base64.length % 4 !== 0) {
    base64 += '=';
  }
  const binaryString = atob(base64);
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryString.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < binaryString.length; i++) {
    bytes[i] = binaryString.charCodeAt(i);
  }
  return bytes;
}

/**
 * Base64URL encode (Edge-compatible)
 */
function base64UrlEncode(data: Uint8Array): string {
  let binary = '';
  for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    binary += String.fromCharCode(data[i]);
  }
  return btoa(binary).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/, '');
}

/**
 * Verify a JWT token using Web Crypto API (HMAC-SHA256).
 * Performs constant-time signature comparison via crypto.subtle.verify.
 */
async function verifyToken(token: string, secret: string): Promise<TokenPayload | null> {
  try {
    const parts = token.split('.');
    if (parts.length !== 3) {
      return null;
    }

    const [headerB64, payloadB64, signatureB64] = parts;

    // Verify the header specifies the expected algorithm
    const headerJson = new TextDecoder().decode(base64UrlDecode(headerB64));
    const header = JSON.parse(headerJson);
    if (header.alg !== 'HS256' || header.typ !== 'JWT') {
      return null;
    }

    // Verify signature using Web Crypto (constant-time comparison internally)
    const key = await importKey(secret);
    const encoder = new TextEncoder();
    const data = encoder.encode(`${headerB64}.${payloadB64}`);
    const signature = base64UrlDecode(signatureB64);

    const isValid = await crypto.subtle.verify(
      TOKEN_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM,
      key,
      signature,
      data
    );

    if (!isValid) {
      return null;
    }

    // Decode and validate payload
    const payloadJson = new TextDecoder().decode(base64UrlDecode(payloadB64));
    const payload: TokenPayload = JSON.parse(payloadJson);

    // Validate expiration
    const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    if (payload.exp && payload.exp < now) {
      return null;
    }

    // Validate issued-at is not in the future (with 30s clock skew tolerance)
    if (payload.iat && payload.iat > now + 30) {
      return null;
    }

    // Validate issuer
    const expectedIssuer = process.env.TOKEN_ISSUER || 'app';
    if (payload.iss && payload.iss !== expectedIssuer) {
      return null;
    }

    // Validate audience
    const expectedAudience = process.env.TOKEN_AUDIENCE || 'app';
    if (payload.aud && payload.aud !== expectedAudience) {
      return null;
    }

    return payload;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

/**
 * Generate a signed JWT token using Web Crypto API.
 */
async function generateToken(payload: Omit<TokenPayload, 'iat'>, secret: string): Promise<string> {
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();

  const header = { alg: 'HS256', typ: 'JWT' };
  const fullPayload = { ...payload, iat: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) };

  const headerB64 = base64UrlEncode(encoder.encode(JSON.stringify(header)));
  const payloadB64 = base64UrlEncode(encoder.encode(JSON.stringify(fullPayload)));

  const key = await importKey(secret);
  const data = encoder.encode(`${headerB64}.${payloadB64}`);
  const signatureBuffer = await crypto.subtle.sign(TOKEN_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM, key, data);
  const signatureB64 = base64UrlEncode(new Uint8Array(signatureBuffer));

  return `${headerB64}.${payloadB64}.${signatureB64}`;
}

/**
 * Check if a path is public (doesn't require authentication)
 */
function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  if (PUBLIC_PATHS.has(pathname)) {
    return true;
  }

  // Check prefix matches for static assets and public files
  for (const publicPath of PUBLIC_PATHS) {
    if (pathname.startsWith(publicPath + '/') || pathname.startsWith(publicPath)) {
      return true;
    }
  }

  return false;
}

/**
 * Check if a path is only for unauthenticated users
 */
function isAuthOnlyPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return AUTH_ONLY_PATHS.has(pathname);
}

/**
 * Apply security headers to the response
 */
function applySecurityHeaders(response: NextResponse): NextResponse {
  // Prevent clickjacking
  response.headers.set('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');

  // Prevent MIME type sniffing
  response.headers.set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');

  // Enable XSS protection
  response.headers.set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');

  // Referrer policy
  response.headers.set('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');

  // Permissions policy
  response.headers.set(
    'Permissions-Policy',
    'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), interest-cohort=()'
  );

  // Strict Transport Security
  response.headers.set(
    'Strict-Transport-Security',
    'max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload'
  );

  // Content Security Policy
  response.headers.set(
    'Content-Security-Policy',
    "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';"
  );

  return response;
}

/**
 * Rate limiting using a simple in-memory approach for Edge.
 * In production, use a distributed store like Upstash Redis.
 */
const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();
const RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 1000; // 1 minute
const RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS = 100;

function checkRateLimit(identifier: string): { allowed: boolean; remaining: number; resetTime: number } {
  const now = Date.now();
  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(identifier);

  if (!entry || now > entry.resetTime) {
    const resetTime = now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS;
    rateLimitMap.set(identifier, { count: 1, resetTime });
    return { allowed: true, remaining: RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS - 1, resetTime };
  }

  entry.count++;
  if (entry.count > RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS) {
    return { allowed: false, remaining: 0, resetTime: entry.resetTime };
  }

  return { allowed: true, remaining: RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS - entry.count, resetTime: entry.resetTime };
}

/**
 * Generate a CSRF token
 */
async function generateCsrfToken(sessionId: string, secret: string): Promise<string> {
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const key = await importKey(secret);
  const timestamp = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000).toString();
  const data = encoder.encode(`${sessionId}:${timestamp}`);
  const signature = await crypto.subtle.sign(TOKEN_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM, key, data);
  const signatureB64 = base64UrlEncode(new Uint8Array(signature));
  return `${timestamp}.${signatureB64}`;
}

/**
 * Verify a CSRF token
 */
async function verifyCsrfToken(
  csrfToken: string,
  sessionId: string,
  secret: string
): Promise<boolean> {
  try {
    const parts = csrfToken.split('.');
    if (parts.length !== 2) return false;

    const [timestamp, signatureB64] = parts;
    const encoder = new TextEncoder();
    const key = await importKey(secret);
    const data = encoder.encode(`${sessionId}:${timestamp}`);
    const signature = base64UrlDecode(signatureB64);

    const isValid = await crypto.subtle.verify(TOKEN_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM, key, signature, data);
    if (!isValid) return false;

    // Check token is not too old (1 hour max)
    const tokenTime = parseInt(timestamp, 10);
    const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    if (now - tokenTime > 3600) return false;

    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

/**
 * Attempt to refresh an expired session token using the refresh token.
 */
async function attemptTokenRefresh(
  request: NextRequest,
  secret: string
): Promise<{ response: NextResponse; newToken: string } | null> {
  const refreshToken = request.cookies.get(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;
  if (!refreshToken) return null;

  const refreshPayload = await verifyToken(refreshToken, secret);
  if (!refreshPayload) return null;

  // Generate a new session token
  const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
  const jti = crypto.randomUUID();
  const newPayload: Omit<TokenPayload, 'iat'> = {
    sub: refreshPayload.sub,
    email: refreshPayload.email,
    role: refreshPayload.role,
    exp: now + 15 * 60, // 15 minutes
    jti,
    iss: process.env.TOKEN_ISSUER || 'app',
    aud: process.env.TOKEN_AUDIENCE || 'app',
  };

  const newToken = await generateToken(newPayload, secret);

  const response = NextResponse.next();
  response.cookies.set(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, newToken, {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    path: '/',
    maxAge: 15 * 60,
  });

  return { response, newToken };
}

/**
 * Main middleware function
 */
export async function middleware(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {
  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;
  const secret = process.env.JWT_SECRET;

  // Ensure JWT_SECRET is configured
  if (!secret) {
    console.error('JWT_SECRET environment variable is not set');
    return new NextResponse('Internal Server Error', { status: 500 });
  }

  // Rate limiting
  const clientIp = request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||
    request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||
    'unknown';

  // Hash the IP for privacy
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const ipHash = base64UrlEncode(
    new Uint8Array(await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', encoder.encode(clientIp)))
  );

  const rateLimit = checkRateLimit(ipHash);
  if (!rateLimit.allowed) {
    const response = new NextResponse('Too Many Requests', { status: 429 });
    response.headers.set('Retry-After', Math.ceil((rateLimit.resetTime - Date.now()) / 1000).toString());
    response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Limit', RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.toString());
    response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Remaining', '0');
    response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Reset', Math.ceil(rateLimit.resetTime / 1000).toString());
    return applySecurityHeaders(response);
  }

  // Get the auth token from cookies
  const authToken = request.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;

  // For public paths, allow access but still set security headers
  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    // If user is authenticated and trying to access auth-only pages, redirect to dashboard
    if (authToken && isAuthOnlyPath(pathname)) {
      const payload = await verifyToken(authToken, secret);
      if (payload) {
        const dashboardUrl = new URL('/dashboard', request.url);
        const response = NextResponse.redirect(dashboardUrl);
        return applySecurityHeaders(response);
      }
    }

    const response = NextResponse.next();
    response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Limit', RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.toString());
    response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Remaining', rateLimit.remaining.toString());
    return applySecurityHeaders(response);
  }

  // For protected paths, verify authentication
  if (!authToken) {
    // No token present - redirect to login for page requests, return 401 for API
    if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
      const response = new NextResponse(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Authentication required', code: 'UNAUTHENTICATED' }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
      return applySecurityHeaders(response);
    }

    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('callbackUrl', pathname);
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    // Clear any stale cookies
    response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
    response.cookies.delete(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME);
    return applySecurityHeaders(response);
  }

  // Verify the token
  let payload = await verifyToken(authToken, secret);

  // If token is invalid/expired, attempt refresh
  if (!payload) {
    const refreshResult = await attemptTokenRefresh(request, secret);

    if (refreshResult) {
      // Token was refreshed successfully
      const newPayload = await verifyToken(refreshResult.newToken, secret);
      if (newPayload) {
        payload = newPayload;
        // Continue with the refreshed response
        const response = refreshResult.response;

        // Set user info headers for downstream use
        response.headers.set('X-User-Id', payload.sub);
        response.headers.set('X-User-Email', payload.email);
        response.headers.set('X-User-Role', payload.role);
        response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Limit', RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.toString());
        response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Remaining', rateLimit.remaining.toString());

        return applySecurityHeaders(response);
      }
    }

    // Token is invalid and refresh failed
    if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
      const response = new NextResponse(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid or expired token', code: 'TOKEN_EXPIRED' }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
      response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
      response.cookies.delete(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME);
      return applySecurityHeaders(response);
    }

    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('callbackUrl', pathname);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('reason', 'session_expired');
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
    response.cookies.delete(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME);
    return applySecurityHeaders(response);
  }

  // CSRF protection for state-changing requests
  const method = request.method.toUpperCase();
  if (['POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE'].includes(method) && pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
    const csrfToken = request.headers.get('x-csrf-token');
    if (!csrfToken) {
      const response = new NextResponse(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'CSRF token missing', code: 'CSRF_MISSING' }),
        {
          status: 403,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
      return applySecurityHeaders(response);
    }

    const csrfValid = await verifyCsrfToken(csrfToken, payload.jti, secret);
    if (!csrfValid) {
      const response = new NextResponse(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid CSRF token', code: 'CSRF_INVALID' }),
        {
          status: 403,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
      return applySecurityHeaders(response);
    }
  }

  // Role-based access control for admin routes
  if (pathname.startsWith('/admin') || pathname.startsWith('/api/admin')) {
    if (payload.role !== 'admin') {
      if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
        const response = new NextResponse(
          JSON.stringify({ error: 'Insufficient permissions', code: 'FORBIDDEN' }),
          {
            status: 403,
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          }
        );
        return applySecurityHeaders(response);
      }

      const forbiddenUrl = new URL('/403', request.url);
      const response = NextResponse.redirect(forbiddenUrl);
      return applySecurityHeaders(response);
    }
  }

  // Token is valid - proceed with the request
  const response = NextResponse.next();

  // Set user info headers for downstream use (internal only, stripped by Vercel for external)
  response.headers.set('X-User-Id', payload.sub);
  response.headers.set('X-User-Email', payload.email);
  response.headers.set('X-User-Role', payload.role);
  response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Limit', RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.toString());
  response.headers.set('X-RateLimit-Remaining', rateLimit.remaining.toString());

  // Generate and set CSRF token for the session
  const csrfToken = await generateCsrfToken(payload.jti, secret);
  response.headers.set('X-CSRF-Token', csrfToken);

  // Proactive token refresh: if token expires within 5 minutes, refresh it
  const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
  const timeUntilExpiry = payload.exp - now;
  if (timeUntilExpiry < 5 * 60) {
    const jti = crypto.randomUUID();
    const newPayload: Omit<TokenPayload, 'iat'> = {
      sub: payload.sub,
      email: payload.email,
      role: payload.role,
      exp: now + 15 * 60,
      jti,
      iss: process.env.TOKEN_ISSUER || 'app',
      aud: process.env.TOKEN_AUDIENCE || 'app',
    };

    const newToken = await generateToken(newPayload, secret);
    response.cookies.set(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, newToken, {
      httpOnly: true,
      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
      sameSite: 'lax',
      path: '/',
      maxAge: 15 * 60,
    });
  }

  return applySecurityHeaders(response);
}

/**
 * Configure which paths the middleware should run on
 */
export const config = {
  matcher: [
    /*
     * Match all request paths except:
     * - _next/static (static files)
     * - _next/image (image optimization files)
     * - favicon.ico (favicon file)
     * - public folder assets
     */
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon\\.ico|public/).*)',
  ],
};
